## Description

Automated alert with enriched AWS logs for pipeline-ai-analysis-github

## Error Details

```text
{"event": {"awslogs": {"data": ""}}, "enrichment": {"logs": "[Container] 2026/05/07 13:22:42.470384 Phase context status code: COMMAND_EXECUTION_ERROR Message: Error while executing command: cat \"buildspec.yaml\". Reason: exit status 1\n", "failure_summary": "CloudWatch Logs Error Pattern Matched", "pipeline": "pipeline-ai-analysis-github", "stage": "Build", "category": "Build", "action": "CloudWatch Filter", "project": "/aws/codepipeline/pipeline-ai-analysis-github"}}
```

## Root Cause Analysis

ROOT CAUSE:
Error executing command 'cat buildspec.yaml' due to missing file or permission issue.

EXPLANATION:
The command 'cat buildspec.yaml' failed with exit status 1 as indicated by the log entry '[Container] 2026/05/07 13:22:42.470384 Phase context status code: COMMAND_EXECUTION_ERROR'. This suggests that the file 'buildspec.yaml' is either missing or the user lacks permission to read it.

SEVERITY:
CRITICAL

IMPACT:
The 'CloudWatch Filter' action in the 'pipeline-ai-analysis-github' pipeline is failing, blocking the 'Build' stage and preventing engineers from continuing the deployment process until this issue is resolved.

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
- Check if 'buildspec.yaml' exists in the CodeBuild project directory; if not, create it.
- If 'buildspec.yaml' exists, ensure the user running the CodeBuild project has read permissions for 'buildspec.yaml'.
- Review the CodeBuild project configuration to ensure 'buildspec.yaml' is correctly specified and located in the right path.

## Suggested Fix

No suggested fix has been stored yet.
